questions.q: In the ship analogy, which component corresponds to the log recording everything loaded, where, and when?
questions.explanation: ETCD is the ship's log. It records all configuration and cluster state details, serving as the single source of truth.

questions.q: The Control Plane nodes run the actual user application workloads.
questions.explanation: False. User application workloads (containers) are run on the Worker Nodes. Control Plane nodes manage the cluster.
